layoutRegions.name: retention-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Track retention policies, ledger expiry windows, receipt holds, and purge-safe ledgers.

layoutRegions.name: policy-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare archive retention policies by owner, expiry window, hold state, and purge preview.

layoutRegions.name: purge-preview-workspace
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect closeout holds, owner acknowledgement history, retry hash preservation, checksum repair retention, and rollback-safe purge previews.

components.name: MetricTile
components.purpose: Compact retention counter with semantic status tone.

components.name: PolicyCard
components.purpose: Archive retention policy card showing expiry window, purge preview, status, and proof progress.
interactions: status chip maps to retention state

components.name: PreviewRow
components.purpose: Rollback-safe purge preview row with impact and rollback bundle details.
interactions: preview text remains readable at narrow widths
row layout does not shift when state changes

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button and status row has a visible focus or stable hover-safe presentation.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
